title: CreamyKeys
description: A mod that adds keyboard and mouse clicking sounds in game for your inputs, You can add your own sounds now!
body:
**CreamyKeys**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow) [![Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cutebow/CreamyKeys)
--- Turn every input into satisfyingly “creamy” mechanical keyboard clicks. CreamyKeys adds real keyclicks to you're key clicking, and theres also a mouse click which you can have a different sound set for that, on default is what I prefer to use but you can always change it! There is a ton of added sound packs within the mod you can choose from and now you can finally add your own if you are updated! within settings you can open the config folder and there's a txt explaining more in depth but its very simple! **Requires** - Silicon: [Silicon](https://modrinth.com/mod/silicons) - Mod Menu: [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) **Check out my other mods!:** - [Custom Anchors Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-anchors) - [Crystal Glow](https://modrinth.com/mod/crystal-glow) - [Anchor Glow](https://modrinth.com/mod/anchor-glow) If you would like to help support the development of this mod - https://ko-fi.com/cutebow **WARNING** **DO NOT download any jar file someone sends you claiming to be a sound pack for creamykeys. soundpacks should only be a .zip with .ogg sound files inside.** [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
